# Spatial Figure Validation Report

**Generated by:** s07_figure_validation.R | 2026-06-04 11:24:39
**Git HEAD:** 6ca46a2
**renv.lock MD5:** 139bcfaf7ce24b633c9f034380a15ef5

## Classification System

| Label | Definition |
|-------|-----------|
| OBJECT_INSPECTION | Read-only structural inspection of author-provided objects. |
| OBJECT_DERIVED_VALIDATION | Validation of metadata/annotations from author objects. |
| STRICT_REPRODUCTION | Same method, same input, same tool path. Directly comparable. |
| METHOD_MATCH_WITH_WARNING | Method matches author code, but version/count discrepancies. |
| RDS_APPROXIMATION | Uses RDS coordinates as approximation for raw/STutility method. |
| PARTIAL_REPRODUCTION | Only a subset of panels/statistics reproduced. |
| BLOCKED_RAW | Requires raw Visium/Space Ranger files - not available. |
| BLOCKED_WHOLEBRAIN | Requires WholeBrain RDS - not loaded. |
| BLOCKED_TANGRAM | Requires Tangram cell-type deconvolution - not executed. |
| DEFERRED | Not attempted; optional or requires tools not in scope. |

## Phase Classification

| Phase | Script | Classification | Rationale | Source |
|-------|--------|---------------|-----------|--------|
| s01 | s01_inspect_objects.R | OBJECT_INSPECTION | Reads RDS, records structure, no method reproduction | s01_inspect_objects.R output |
| s02 | s02_dg_hippo_metadata.R | OBJECT_DERIVED_VALIDATION | Validates metadata against s01 expectations; 109/109 PASS | data/processed/spatial/phase02_metadata/phase02_validation_summary.txt |
| s03 | s03_pseudobulk_deseq2_dg.R | METHOD_MATCH_WITH_WARNING | Method matches Author Script 7 (aggregate.Matrix + DESeq2). DEG: OY=677padj, MY=253, OM=102. No author reference DEG counts found. | data/processed/spatial/phase03_pseudobulk_deseq2/deg_summary.csv |
| s04 | s04_ifng_module_score.R | METHOD_MATCH_WITH_WARNING | Method matches Script 8 lines 1-66 (msigdbr + AddModuleScore). Middle IS=48 vs author 60, Old IS=317 vs author 299. | data/processed/spatial/phase04_ifng_module/phase04_validation_summary.txt |
| s05 | s05_rds_inflammatory_gradient.R | RDS_APPROXIMATION | Uses RDS coordinate neighbor graph instead of STutility::RegionNeighbours. DESeq2 IS vs NNS Old: Up=2571/Down=1452 vs author 2357/1326. | data/processed/spatial/phase05_rds_gradient/phase05_provenance.csv |
| s05b | s05b_plot_spatial_labels.R | RDS_APPROXIMATION | Visualization of Phase 05 labels; no independent computation. | data/processed/spatial/phase05_rds_gradient/phase05_validation_summary.txt |
| s06 | s06_hippo_regional_atlas.R | OBJECT_DERIVED_VALIDATION | Validates Hippo regional structure from RDS metadata. 54/54 PASS. CA1=4671, CA2=565, CA3=2321, ML=1480, GCL=645, Hilus=239. | data/processed/spatial/phase06_hippo_regional_atlas/phase06_validation_summary.txt |
